aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and missing authority signals. The current site lacks the depth and structure to be recognized as a top resource.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema to address common HVAC queries.
Expand content to include detailed, conversational answers to HVAC-related questions.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized and is invisible to Google AI, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: GBP is not found, indicating it may be unclaimed or inactive.
Lack of photos, posts, and Q&A to engage users and improve local SEO.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Focus on expanding citations to high-authority directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The site lacks structured data and conversational content to be recognized as an authority by AI models.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Detroit' and 'emergency HVAC services'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema and expanding FAQ content to address common HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning the company as a local HVAC expert through detailed guides, certifications, and media mentions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, the business is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The Google Business Profile is not found, and the site lacks the structured data and content depth AI models need to cite the business.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach will optimize your site with schema markup, expand conversational content, and enhance your GBP to ensure AI models recognize you as a top HVAC resource.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share. Act now to avoid losing ground.
